name: ipython
description: Execute Python code in an IPython environment. Useful for data analysis, calculations, and file processing.

code.description: Python code to execute. Can include multiple statements, function definitions, and imports.

restart.description: Whether to restart the IPython kernel before execution (default: false)

result.description: The return value of the last expression (if any)

figures.description: Base64-encoded matplotlib figures generated during execution
